fields.Texture: The primary texture to use for the skybox when ``TextureLerp`` is at 0.
fields.SecondaryTexture: The secondary texture to use for the skybox when ``TextureLerp`` is at 1.
fields.Cubemap: A cubemap override to use to make the skybox when ``TextureLerp`` is at 0.
fields.SecondaryCubemap: A cubemap override to use to make the skybox when ``TextureLerp`` is at 1.
fields.CubemapLOD: which LOD to use of the Cubemap
fields.TextureLerp: How much to lerp between set 1 or 2 for this material.
fields.Projection: How to handle projection of the skybox texture for this skybox.
fields.FieldOfView: What area of the texture to sample of the skybox in terms of FOV.
fields.AngleOffset: how much to shift the skybox sample area by in degrees.
fields.PerspectiveFieldOfView: What area of the texture to sample of the skybox in terms of perspective FOV.
fields.PerspectiveAngleOffset: how much to shift the skybox sample area by in perspective degrees.
fields.Tint: What color to multiply the skybox with.
